review_boundary: This record establishes immutable-paper acquisition, successful full-text extraction, and timing-aware complete archives of the two linked official repositories. It does not establish pilot validity, annotation quality, judge reliability, criterion support, contextual representativeness, release-paper equivalence, reproducibility, professional utility, production fitness, or readiness.
